last_episode_to_air.name: The Purple Witch
last_episode_to_air.overview: Kleo and Sven arrive in Chile, where they track down an elusive Jorge. Later they tangle with Ramona, whose water breaks at an inopportune moment.

name: Kleo
overview: After the fall of the Berlin Wall, a former East German spy resolves to find out who betrayed her and why — and use her lethal skills to exact revenge.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: After the fall of the Berlin Wall, a former East German spy resolves to find out who betrayed her and why — and use her lethal skills to exact revenge.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: The hunt for the red suitcase continues! But it's not just Kleo who is after the secret documents—the CIA and KGB are also suddenly looking for them. Not only is Kleo about to uncover more information as to why she was once sent to prison, she's also going to learn about her own past.

episodes.name: Big Eden
episodes.overview: Top Stasi agent Kleo Straub liquidates a target in a West German nightclub. Soon after, she must face a life-changing betrayal and a heartbreaking loss.

episodes.name: The Reunion
episodes.overview: Determined to find her files, Kleo tracks down her former handler and makes her way into Stasi headquarters. Later, she seeks out Thilo in a dance club.

episodes.name: Snow in Sóller
episodes.overview: Kleo heads to Mallorca, chased by Sven. She infiltrates a party and uses a toxin to paralyze Wieczorek's wife, leading him to make a deadly confession.

episodes.name: The Minister
episodes.overview: With Min and Uwe on her tail, Kleo bribes a little girl to deliver a poisoned Bundt cake to Mielke's jail cell. After a showdown, Kleo digs up a letter.

episodes.name: Uwe
episodes.overview: Kleo and Sven form a wary alliance. Anne visits Kleo claiming to look for her grandfather. After failing to kill her, Uwe sets up a meeting with Kleo.

episodes.name: Object Else
episodes.overview: Severely wounded in a shooting, Kleo has a revealing flashback. With the ominous red suitcase seemingly in hand, Sven shares a devastating truth.

episodes.name: The Snipe and the Clam
episodes.overview: After Andi is wounded by Kleo, a double agent prevents him from unpacking the conspiracy behind the red suitcase. Sven, Kleo and Min move in on a mole.

episodes.name: The Purple Witch
episodes.overview: Kleo and Sven arrive in Chile, where they track down an elusive Jorge. Later they tangle with Ramona, whose water breaks at an inopportune moment.
